entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species being studied for seed dormancy and pre-harvest sprouting.

entities.name: PRE-HARVEST SPROUTING
entities.description: A condition in groundnut that leads to yield losses and reduced seed quality.

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: A trait in groundnut seeds that, when maintained for 14-21 days, mitigates pre-harvest sprouting.

entities.name: ML-GWAS
entities.description: Multi-locus genome-wide association study models used to detect SNP-trait associations.

entities.name: SL-GWAS
entities.description: Single-locus genome-wide association study model used to detect SNP-trait associations.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of groundnut germplasm used for phenotyping and genotyping.

entities.name: MULTI SEASON PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of evaluating traits across multiple seasons to ensure consistency.

entities.name: AXIOM_ARACHIS ARRAY
entities.description: A 58 K genotyping array used to obtain genetic data for groundnut.

entities.name: SNP-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Statistical associations between single nucleotide polymorphisms and specific traits.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME B02
entities.description: A specific chromosome in groundnut where a consistent STA for fresh seed dormancy was identified.

entities.name: QFSD-B02-1
entities.description: A specific SNP-trait association identified on chromosome B02 consistently by both ML-GWAS and SL-GWAS.

entities.name: CYTOCHROME P450 705 A
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: DORMANCY/AUXIN ASSOCIATED FAMILY PROTEIN
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: WRKY FAMILY TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: PROTEIN KINASE SUPERFAMILY PROTEIN
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: SERINE/THREONINE PROTEIN PHOSPHATASE
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: MYB TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTIONAL REGULATOR STERILE APETALA-LIKE
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: ETHYLENE-RESPONSIVE TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR 7-LIKE
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: F-BOX PROTEIN INTERACTION DOMAIN PROTEIN
entities.description: A high confidence candidate gene involved in regulating dormancy and germination.

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID/GIBBERELLIC ACID SIGNALING PATHWAYS
entities.description: Molecular pathways that regulate the processes of seed dormancy and germination.

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed sprouting, regulated by specific signaling pathways and genes.

entities.name: ALLELE-SPECIFIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed from identified STAs used for validation and selection.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using genetic markers to select for desired traits like increased dormancy.
